description:
Corn Kidz 64
The unique aura of bygone 64-bit worlds resurrected in this
"pilot episode" 3D platformer roughly 1/3rd the size of the classics.

v0.0.2.description:
- added black headband location
- added "stupid duck thing" as a location
- added Sybil painting as a location
- fix Trinket Shop items access
- rename Church Pillar XP Cube location

[Setup Guide](https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/blob/v0.0.2/docs/setup_en.md)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.1...v0.0.2
v0.0.2.title: v0.0.2

v0.0.4.description:
- fix Trinket Shop items access (again)
- fix Anxiety Tower items access
- added missing indirect condition for Zombie Chamber (fixes UT logic)
- added version in slot data

[Setup Guide](https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/blob/v0.0.4/docs/setup_en.md)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.4
v0.0.4.title: v0.0.4

v0.0.5.description:
- new option: **Movesanity**
  - randomize the following move into the itempool:
    - Punch
    - Climb (+ Ledge Grab)
    - Slam
    - Headbutt
    - Wall Jump
    - Crouch
- new option: **Open Wollow's Hollow**
  - start the game with Wollow's Hollow accessible with no moves required
- fix fishsanity checks not being excluded when fishsanity is disabled
- added UT yamlless support
- make extra XP useful instead of progression
- rename locations to better names (thanks to source)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.4...v0.0.5
v0.0.5.title: v0.0.5

v0.0.6.description:
- Added Ally Picture Check
- **Multiple Goals** can now be selected
  - Note: the option was also renamed from `goal` to `goal_selection`
- Added new option **Switchsanity**
  - This adds the 4 Switches for the door to Dog God in Some Other Place to item/location pool
- Added new option **Test Cubesanity**
  - This adds the 25 Test Cube from the Test Zone to item/location pool
- Div. logic fixes:
  - Fixed zoo rat 2 requirements
  - Fixed VoidScrewHollowSky missing Slam requirement
  - Fixed MirrorHollowZooSideCrank requirement
  - Fixed CubeParkSlide requirement
  - Fixed MonsterParkHouseFoyer access requirements
- Fix some UT issues
- Added archipelago.json
- Switched to Rule Builder

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6
v0.0.6.title: v0.0.6
